summary: The video shows a foggy day with poor visibility. Multiple vehicles are traveling on a rural road. A white SUV overtakes the vehicle from which the footage originates, passing closely alongside it.

events_timeline.event: A white SUV overtakes the vehicle from which the footage originates, passing closely alongside it.

uncertainties: Weather conditions are unclear due to fog.
Visibility is compromised by fog, making precise assessment challenging.

risk_assessment.why: Poor visibility caused by fog may lead to potential accidents.
